voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Cường ép lưng vào tường. Bê tông cứng, gồ ghề, thật. Anh có thể cảm nhận từng hạt cát trên bề mặt. Thật. Thế giới thực. Ozon. Cồn. Kim loại. Thật.
voice_adherence.fix: The repetition of 'Thật' feels slightly mechanical rather than earned. Replace with a single specific sensory detail that conveys reality without stating it: 'Bê tông gồ ghề. Một mảnh sỏi nhỏ đâm vào vai. Ozon. Cồn. Không có pixel.'
voice_adherence.note: The chapter largely nails the cold, surgical voice. Technical vocabulary wells are used effectively (traceroute, TTL, hex, gói tin). Sentence rhythm varies well between clipped action sentences and longer technical descriptions. The body-before-emotion principle is followed: Cường's panic manifests through dry mouth, backing into walls, heat on his chest — never through named emotion. The weakest moment is a passage that tells 'thật' four times when the voice profile demands showing through wrong details.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Beat 3 (thấy bóng người trong thế giới ảo) is executed through a monitoring interface rather than direct experience. Cường watches the render on screen instead of being inside the virtual world. This creates distance at the moment that should be most visceral.
beat_coverage.fix: Consider having Cường briefly 'dive' into the virtual space — even a partial, unauthorized connection — to encounter the figure directly. The screen-mediated viewing dilutes the horror. Alternatively, lean harder into the uncanny: the figure on screen turns and looks at the CAMERA, breaking the fourth wall of the monitoring system.
beat_coverage.note: All four beats are present and dramatized. Beat 1 (truy xuất dữ liệu nhiễu, phát hiện luồng tín hiệu lạ từ St. Vincent) is the strongest — methodical, building dread through technical discovery. Beat 2 (phát hiện Người Thứ 13) lands well through the traceroute returning '13.' Beat 4 (ping tăng vọt, vỡ hạt) is visceral and well-executed. The emotional arc (đau đớn → hoang mang → kinh hoàng) tracks correctly.

character_voice.weakest_moment: Anh cần bình tĩnh. Bình tĩnh là một hàm số: input + logic = output. Input: tín hiệu bị rẽ hướng. Logic: tìm nguồn. Output: giải pháp. Đơn giản. Anh là kế toán. Anh giải bài toán mỗi ngày.
character_voice.fix: The equation metaphor is too clean, too 'written.' A real accountant in panic would reach for numbers differently — more fragmented, more desperate. Try: 'Bình tĩnh. Đếm. 849 lần đổ bộ. 60% phân mảnh. 14ms ping. Số không nói dối. Số không nhìn anh bằng đôi mắt trống rỗng.'
character_voice.note: Cường's voice is consistent with the character profile: short sentences, technical vocabulary, avoidance of emotional language, 90% statements. His accounting mindset comes through in how he categorizes and counts. The dialogue from the entity ('Anh thấy em không?') effectively mirrors Kẻ Đuổi's speech pattern but with the described difference — deeper, older, like a scratched record. The POV character's internal monologue never breaks into sentimentality, respecting the voice profile.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The connection between Bệnh nhân 04-ĐM and Kẻ Đuổi is stated rather than discovered organically. Cường receives a data packet that literally says 'NGUỒN: 04-ĐM' — this feels too convenient, like the system labeling itself.
plants_seeded.fix: Instead of a labeled data packet, have Cường cross-reference the IP address with hospital records he shouldn't have access to — or notice that the signal pattern from Device 13 matches the anomalous vital signs of Patient 4 that he overheard in the previous chapter's phone call. Make him WORK for the connection.
plants_seeded.note: The Người Thứ 13 plant is excellently integrated — introduced through technical investigation rather than exposition. The 'vỡ hạt' phenomenon is foreshadowed through escalating ping rates, earning the payoff. The signal-transmission-without-cable mystery is a strong new thread. The final reflection — 'Anh là con mồi' — effectively shifts Cường's self-perception without over-explaining.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Bình tĩnh là một hàm số: input + logic = output.
prose_quality.fix: Cut the equation. Replace with: 'Bình tĩnh. Gõ. Đọc. Gõ tiếp. Tay không run. Không run.' — showing attempted calm through action rather than explaining it through metaphor.
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Trong mỗi hốc, có ánh sáng — xanh nhạt, cùng màu với đèn huỳnh quang ở Khu Nằm — và ánh sáng đó nhìn thẳng vào anh.
prose_quality.note: Sentence variety is strong. The chapter mixes one-word paragraphs ('Im.'), technical run-ons, and medium-length observational sentences. Concrete sensory details dominate: bê tông lạnh, da bỏng rát từ bên trong, mùi hoa sữa có trọng lượng. The strongest sentence uses the specific color of hospital fluorescents to connect the virtual horror to the real-world setting — a detail that earns its creepiness. The weakest sentences tend to be ones where the narrator explains Cường's thought process too explicitly.

continuity.note: Excellent continuity from the previous chapter. The vết xước (scratch replacing the earlier vết bầm/bruise) is tracked with consistent parameters: 40 nhịp/phút, 37.5°C, transmitting at 47.3 Hz. Cường's emotional state — shaken by the Kẻ Đuổi's 'Em thấy anh. Ở đây. Và ở ngoài kia' — carries forward naturally into his investigative mindset here. The previous chapter ended with him noting the signal transmits to St. Vincent; this chapter follows that thread. The 'ba không biết' from the previous recording is referenced. The Bệnh nhân số 4 detail from 'cuộc điện thoại đêm qua' connects to established lore. One minor inconsistency: the previous chapter ends with Cường standing, drinking water, deciding he needs something real. This chapter opens with him at the server, finger tapping — the transition is functional but could be smoother.

violations: Minor: The chapter states Cường's ping is normally 14ms, consistent with canon. However, the 'vỡ hạt' threshold is described as above 50ms in canon, and the chapter shows significant system disruption at 51ms onward — this is actually compliant, just noting the escalation is accurate.

Minor: Canon states 'Không ai tồn tại đồng thời cả hai thế giới' (Rule 5), and the chapter respects this — Cường observes the virtual world through a monitoring interface, not through a dive. However, the moment when the entity's voice enters his brain directly ('trong não anh, không phải qua màn hình') pushes against this rule. It's ambiguous enough to be acceptable — the voice comes through neural signal, not through a full dive — but worth flagging.
canon_compliance.note: All major canon facts are respected: 73 patients at St. Vincent, 12 connected to Neural Mantle, server 1.2 km from hospital, Cumberland Tunnel location, Patient 4 as source, Device 13 with no records. The technical details (traceroute, IP ranges, TTL values) are internally consistent. The 'Người Thứ 13' lore from Du Mục rumors is accurately referenced.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The explanation of how Patient 4 connects to Kẻ Đuổi — while accurate to canon — is delivered in a paragraph of straight exposition near the chapter's end: 'Bệnh nhân số 4 là nguồn cấp dữ liệu cho Kẻ Đuổi. Và Kẻ Đuổi đã dùng nguồn đó để tìm đường đến anh.'
lore_integration.fix: Weave this realization into action. Have Cường discover the connection by noticing the signal pattern from Device 13 matches the vital sign anomalies of Patient 4 — connecting the dots himself rather than narrating the conclusion.
lore_integration.note: The world does significant work in this chapter. The technical infrastructure (cáp quang, nút chuyển tiếp, IP addressing) isn't set dressing — it's the medium through which horror arrives. The ping escalation isn't arbitrary; it follows established rules and the reader understands why 50ms+ means danger. The 'vỡ hạt' phenomenon is earned through prior establishment. The hospital's physical layout (tầng B3, Khu Nằm, buồng không số) grounds the virtual horror in a real location. Best of all: the mystery of signal transmission without cable at the end uses the world's rules to create a genuine 'oh no' moment.

engagement.weakest_moment: The middle section — Cường running multiple traceroutes and scans — risks losing readers who aren't engaged by technical procedure. The sequence from 'Anh chạy traceroute lần hai' through 'scan toàn bộ dải IP' is methodical but slightly repetitive.
engagement.fix: Compress the second and third traceroute attempts into a single sentence: 'Hai lần traceroute nữa. Cùng kết quả. Im lặng.' Then get to the '13' response faster. The reader's patience should be rewarded more quickly here.
engagement.note: The chapter builds dread effectively through technical discovery — a hard trick to pull off. The moment when traceroute returns '13' is genuinely surprising and creepy. The escalation from digital investigation to physical horror (lights flickering, water rippling, smell of hoa sữa in the real world) is well-paced. The final image — Cường seeing a reflection that isn't there when he turns around — is a strong page-turner. The chapter earns its horror through restraint: the entity doesn't attack, doesn't explain itself. It watches. That's worse.

three_weakest_sentences: Bình tĩnh là một hàm số: input + logic = output. Input: tín hiệu bị rẽ hướng. Logic: tìm nguồn. Output: giải pháp.
Anh cần tập trung. Tín hiệu nhiễu 47.3 Hz vẫn truyền ra từ cơ thể anh, và anh cần biết nó đi đâu, làm gì, kết nối với ai.
Cường nuốt nước bọt. Miệng khô. Lưỡi dính vào vòm họng.
three_strongest_sentences: Trong mỗi hốc, có ánh sáng — xanh nhạt, cùng màu với đèn huỳnh quang ở Khu Nằm — và ánh sáng đó nhìn thẳng vào anh.
Nhưng lần thứ tư, có thứ gì đó trả về. Không phải 'destination unreachable.' Không phải 'no route to host.' Là một gói tin duy nhất, chứa một chuỗi byte ngắn. Anh dịch mã: **13**
Mùi này có trọng lượng. Có nhiệt độ. Có độ ẩm. Nó bám vào da anh, chui vào lỗ chân lông, hòa với mùi ozon và cồn tạo thành thứ gì đó mới — thứ giống như mùi xác ướp trong phòng thí nghiệm.
ai_patterns_detected: Slight paragraph-template repetition: several paragraphs follow the pattern of 'Action. Technical detail. Emotional/physical response.' This isn't severe but is noticeable in the middle investigation section.
The 'three examples' structure appears once: 'Không phải mã lỗi. Không phải ID hệ thống. Chỉ là con số.' — the rule-of-three rhythm is a common AI pattern, though it works here for emphasis.
Minor hedge language: 'hoặc — anh nghĩ, não chạy nhanh hơn tốc độ an toàn — đó là danh tính' — the em-dash parenthetical is slightly overused throughout the chapter (appears 8+ times).
weakest_dimension: beat_coverage — specifically Beat 3, where the encounter with the figure is mediated through a screen rather than experienced directly, creating distance at the chapter's most critical horror moment.
top_3_revisions: Rework Beat 3 to make the encounter with Người Thứ 13 more visceral. Either have Cường experience a partial/unauthorized connection to the virtual space, or make the monitoring interface itself behave uncannily — the figure looks at the CAMERA, breaks through the interface, reaches toward the viewer. The screen-mediated viewing is the chapter's biggest missed opportunity.

Compress the middle investigation sequence (multiple traceroutes, IP scan). Cut the second and third traceroute attempts to a single line and get to the '13' response faster. The technical procedure is earning dread but testing patience — tighten by 20%.

Replace the 'Bình tĩnh là một hàm số' passage with action-based calm: Cường forcing his hands to stop shaking, counting specific numbers from his life (849 dives, 14ms, 60% fragmentation). Show attempted control through body, not through explanatory metaphor.
new_canon_entries: Tín hiệu outgoing từ Cường bị rẽ hướng sang mạng St. Vincent từ lần đổ bộ thứ 846, với độ dài tăng dần (10-15 gói ban đầu, 50 gói ở lần 849).
Gói tin bị rẽ hướng chứa dữ liệu định vị: tọa độ, thời gian, ID phiên đổ bộ, ID người dùng.
Thiết bị thứ 13 tại St. Vincent có IP tự cấp, không có hostname/MAC address, trạng thái LISTENING, ping response 8ms (nhanh hơn mọi nút chuyển tiếp).
Khi ping vượt 127ms, server Cường tắt hoàn toàn rồi bật lại với mọi log bị xóa sạch.
Sau sự cố, kết nối đến St. Vincent bị đứt hoàn toàn nhưng tín hiệu 47.3 Hz vẫn truyền — qua đường không xác định.
Mã bệnh nhân '04-ĐM' (Đoạt Mệnh?) là định danh của bệnh nhân số 4 trong hệ thống.
Người Thứ 13 có thể xóa log server và có thể đọc ghi chú cá nhân của Cường.
